choices.text: Foundry fuzz: function testFuzz_X(uint256 input) auto-generates random inputs, finds failure cases, shrinks. forge test --fuzz-runs 10000. Catches edge cases manual testing misses. Invariant tests find protocol-level bugs.

questions.explanation: Foundry fuzz + invariant testing for edge cases.

choices.text: forge test --fork-url $MAINNET_RPC --fork-block-number N. Tests run against forked mainnet state; interact with real DAI, Uniswap, etc. Reveals integration bugs mocks miss. vm.prank(whale) to transfer real tokens.

questions.explanation: Fork test for realistic external interactions.
